@react.component
let make = () =>
  <Field>
    <Field.Label htmlFor="input-demo-api-key"> {"API Key"->React.string} </Field.Label>
    <Input id="input-demo-api-key" type_="password" placeholder="sk-..." />
    <Field.Description>
      {"Your API key is encrypted and stored securely."->React.string}
    </Field.Description>
  </Field>
